title: Premium 10 Inch Stainless Steel Egg Whisk for Baking, Cooking, Whisking, Beating, Stirring
features: 【Premium Material】This egg beater is made of food-grade stainless steel, which is healthy, environmentally friendly and durable, and will not rust or crack over time.
【Package】10 inch egg whisk, 26 cm, Whichever container you use, bowl, pan or pots, different sizes meet different needs. Versatile, multifunctional in your kitchen.

【Semi-Automatic Design】The semi-automatic egg beater adopts the spring design, so it doesn't need batteries or electricity when working. Simply push the handle down and the whisk effortlessly and evenly stirs the egg liquid. Energy-saving and environmentally friendly!

【Easy to Clean】Our kitchen whisk is easy to clean, rustproof, non-sticky and dishwasher safe. It can be cleaned without disassembling wires and parts. Simply wash with soapy water, rinse and dry, and then you can use it again.
【Application】The hand push whisk can easily whisk eggs, cream, milk, salad dressings, gravies, sauces, mayonnaise and more.Provides a smooth, even and delicate to your mixes.
description: Product Description High Quality Stailess Steel The egg beater is made of high quality stainless steel that is durable and safe. Easy to Use The egg whisk is easy to use and designed with a semi-automatic function. Rotating the egg head, just push down and release upward, you can quickly and evenly mix the egg liquid. Easy to Clean After using the whisk hand mixer, you can directly wash it with soapy water or throw it into the dishwasher.
